title: Internal Secure Software Development Lifecycle Policy
summary: Internal policy establishing secure software development lifecycle requirements for all financial calculation and reporting systems. Mandates code review, testing, security scanning, and documentation standards.

key_requirements.title: Mandatory code review
key_requirements.description: All code changes must be reviewed by at least one qualified reviewer before merge

key_requirements.title: Automated testing
key_requirements.description: Minimum 70% code coverage with unit and integration tests

key_requirements.title: Security scanning
key_requirements.description: All code must pass static analysis security scanning before deployment

key_requirements.title: Documentation requirements
key_requirements.description: All features must include technical documentation and architecture decision records

key_requirements.title: Release approval
key_requirements.description: Production releases require approval from technical lead and compliance officer

engineering_implications.description: Implement comprehensive test suite with coverage reporting
Integrate security scanning tools into CI/CD pipeline
Document all architectural decisions in ADR format
Track all code reviews, approvals, and deployments
